Years as a Nurse

Meet Our Founder

Marchelle Hopson,
RN & Director of Nursing

“I saw families desperate for skilled home nursing care for their children—and a system that kept failing them. I founded Truly Pediatric to close that gap.”

After nearly two decades working as a nurse across multiple care settings, Marchelle witnessed firsthand the critical shortage of in-home nursing care for children with complex medical needs in the Dayton region. Families were left without consistent, qualified support for children who required ventilator management, tracheostomy care, and continuous skilled nursing in the home.

In 2022, Marchelle founded Truly Pediatric Home Care, LLC to bridge that gap. Under her clinical leadership as Director of Nursing, the agency has grown into a CHAP-accredited, MBE and WBE-certified organization committed to serving the region’s most vulnerable pediatric patients and their families.

Marchelle remains an active advocate for Medicaid Waiver programs and fair reimbursement rates, meeting with legislators directly to fight for the families and children Truly Pediatric serves every day.

What We Offer

Specialized care for extraordinary kids

Every service we provide is delivered by trained, compassionate professionals who specialize in pediatric home care.

🩹

Skilled Private Duty Nursing

One-on-one, continuous nursing care delivered in your home by RNs and LPNs trained in pediatric complex care needs.

  • Ventilator & tracheostomy care
  • Medication management
  • Medically fragile patient support
  • 24/7 coordination
🤝

Home Health Aide Services

Trained aides who provide compassionate personal care assistance, so families can focus on connection and quality time.

  • Personal hygiene & daily living
  • Mobility & positioning support
  • Meal prep & feeding assistance
  • Companionship & engagement
👪

Family-Centered Care Model

We treat families as true partners. From care planning to daily communication, we keep parents informed and empowered.

  • Individualized care plans
  • Parent education & training
  • Consistent nurse-patient matching
  • Care team collaboration

Community Involvement

More than nurses—
neighbors & advocates

Truly Pediatric is woven into the Greater Dayton community. Our team volunteers at local events, hands out water at the Gem City Bike Race, provides free health screenings, sponsors youth programs, and advocates directly with state legislators for Medicaid Waiver access and fair reimbursement rates for families.

  • ♥
    Free health screenings at community events
  • ♥
    Gem City Bike Race hydration volunteers
  • ♥
    Youth engagement and mentorship
  • ♥
    Legislative advocacy for Medicaid Waiver families
  • ♥
    Partnerships with local organizations and nonprofits
🎃

Community Events

From foam parties to health fairs, our team shows up joyfully for the families and kids we serve.

🏋

Gem City Bike Race

Proud volunteers at Dayton’s Gem City Bike Race, handing out water and cheering on the community.

🏛

Legislative Advocacy

Marchelle meets directly with legislators to fight for Medicaid Waiver access and equitable reimbursement rates.

Why Families Choose Us

Built on trust,
proven every day

We don’t just provide care—we become a valued part of your family’s support system.

01

Pediatric-Only Focus

We specialize exclusively in children. Our nurses are trained in complex pediatric care, not generalists filling a shift.

02

Consistent Caregivers

We match your child with the right nurse and work to maintain that relationship. Familiarity builds trust and better outcomes.

03

CHAP Accredited

Our accreditation means we meet or exceed national standards for home and community-based health care quality.

04

Diverse & Certified

MBE and WBE certified, we reflect the community we serve and bring culturally competent care to every family.
